question: Which papers report a qualitative data collection method?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:P56008 ?dc .
  ?dc orkgp:P1005 ?method .
  ?method orkgp:P94003 ?methodType .
  ?methodType rdfs:label ?methodTypeLabel .
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?methodTypeLabel)) = LCASE('qualitative'))
  OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . }
}

question: Which papers published in 2020 or later report quantitative collected data?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?paper orkgp:P29 ?year .
  FILTER(xsd:integer(?year) >= 2020)
  ?contribution orkgp:DATA ?data .
  ?data orkgp:P7055 ?dataType .
  ?dataType rdfs:label ?dataTypeLabel .
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?dataTypeLabel)) = LCASE('quantitative'))
  OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . }
}

question: How many papers report more than one data collection method?
Which papers report both recall and precision among their machine-learning metrics?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 .
  FILTER EXISTS {
    ?contribution orkgp:P15124 ?da1 .
    ?da1 orkgp:P57016 ?ml1 .
    ?ml1 orkgp:P2006 ?metric1 .
    ?metric1 rdfs:label ?metricLabel1 .
    FILTER(LCASE(STR(?metricLabel1)) = LCASE('recall'))
  }
  FILTER EXISTS {
    ?contribution orkgp:P15124 ?da2 .
    ?da2 orkgp:P57016 ?ml2 .
    ?ml2 orkgp:P2006 ?metric2 .
    ?metric2 rdfs:label ?metricLabel2 .
    FILTER(LCASE(STR(?metricLabel2)) = LCASE('precision'))
  }
  OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . }
}

question: Which papers report a null hypothesis but no alternative hypothesis?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:P15124 ?da .
  ?da orkgp:P56043 ?inf .
  ?inf orkgp:P30001 ?hypothesis .
  ?hypothesis orkgp:P41703 ?hypothesisType .
  ?hypothesisType orkgp:P35106 ?nullHypothesis .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?hypothesisType orkgp:P35107 ?alternativeHypothesis .
  }
  OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . }
}

question: Which papers report data collection methods but do not specify any method type?
Which papers report both a research question and a research question answer?
What are the reported data collection method names for papers that describe their collected data as qualitative?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?methodName WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:P56008 ?dc .
  ?dc orkgp:DATA ?data .
  ?data orkgp:P7055 ?dataType .
  ?dataType rdfs:label ?dataTypeLabel .
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?dataTypeLabel)) = LCASE('qualitative'))
  ?dc orkgp:P1005 ?method .
  ?method orkgp:P145012 ?methodName .
}

question: Which papers published before 2019 report precision but not recall in their machine-learning metrics?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?paper orkgp:P29 ?year .
  FILTER(xsd:integer(?year) < 2019)
  FILTER EXISTS {
    ?contribution orkgp:P15124 ?da1 .
    ?da1 orkgp:P57016 ?ml1 .
    ?ml1 orkgp:P2006 ?metric1 .
    ?metric1 rdfs:label ?metricLabel1 .
    FILTER(LCASE(STR(?metricLabel1)) = LCASE('precision'))
  }
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?contribution orkgp:P15124 ?da2 .
    ?da2 orkgp:P57016 ?ml2 .
    ?ml2 orkgp:P2006 ?metric2 .
    ?metric2 rdfs:label ?metricLabel2 .
    FILTER(LCASE(STR(?metricLabel2)) = LCASE('recall'))
  }
  OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel . }
}

question: Which venue names are reported for papers that mention both internal validity and external validity threats?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/>
PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/>
PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?venueName WHERE {
  ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution .
  ?contribution a orkgc:C27001 .
  ?contribution orkgp:P39099 ?threats .
  ?threats orkgp:P55035 ?internalValidity .
  ?threats orkgp:P55034 ?externalValidity .
  ?contribution orkgp:P135046 ?venue .
  ?venue rdfs:label ?venueName .
}
